title: Get the Comment-to-Message setting of a Business Account
content:
Use this endpoint to get the status of the Comment-to-Message feature for a Business Account. ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/business/message/direct_reply/get/ **Method** GET **Header** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Access token authorized by TikTok Business Account owner.
To obtain an access token, use [/tt_user/oauth2/token/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1738084387220481#item-link-Get%20a%20TikTok%20account%20access%20token).| ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |business_id {Required}|string|Application specific unique identifier for the TikTok Business Account.
Pass the value of the `open_id` field returned in the response of [/tt_user/oauth2/token/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1738084387220481#item-link-Get%20a%20TikTok%20account%20access%20token) to this field.| |direct_reply_type {Required}|string|The type of direct reply.

Enum value:
  • `COMMENT_TO_MESSAGE`: Comment-to-Message. Once you enable this feature, the TikTok system will identify high-intent comments, enabling you to send customized replies to assist these users more effectively.
| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request GET 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/business/message/direct_reply/get/?business_id={{business_id}}&direct_reply_type=COMMENT_TO_MESSAGE' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' (/code) ``` ## Response ```xtable |Field{30%}|Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |code|number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message|string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id|string|The log ID of a request, which uniquely identifies the request.| |data|object|Returned data.| #|business_id|string|Application specific unique identifier for the TikTok Business Account.| #|direct_reply_type|string|The type of direct reply.

Enum value:
  • `COMMENT_TO_MESSAGE`: Comment-to-Message. Once you enable this feature, the TikTok system will identify high-intent comments, enabling you to send customized replies to assist these users more effectively.
| #|operation_status|string|The status of the direct reply type (`direct_reply_type`).

Enum values:
  • `ENABLE`: Enabled.
  • `DISABLE`: Disabled.

If you want to enable or disable this setting, use [/business/message/direct_reply/update/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1843697551083522). | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "business_id": "{{business_id}}", "direct_reply_type": "COMMENT_TO_MESSAGE", "operation_status": "ENABLE" } } (/code) ```
